overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of Dekelia Fort. The player character, dressed as an ancient Greek hoplite, walks through stone buildings including a map room and storage areas, eventually reaching an overlook with a view of the surrounding valley.

events.description: approaches and enters the wooden doorway of a stone building

agents.ego_description: walking toward the entrance of a stone building in the fort

entered.detail: stone building with tiled roof and wooden door frame
large wooden door frame with stone steps leading up
clay pot with plants beside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit ancient fort courtyard with dry grass and stone buildings. The camera approaches a stone building entrance with wooden door frame and steps, then enters the doorway transitioning from outdoor to indoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: command room with ancient map table

events.description: camera moves closer to examine the map table with scrolls and candles
camera pulls back from the map and moves toward the exit doorway

agents.ego_description: examining the interior room and moving toward a large map table with ancient scrolls

entered.detail: large wooden table with an ancient map of the Mediterranean region
rough-hewn stone block walls with small windows
patterned rug on the stone floor with blue and gold borders
simple wooden bench against the wall
detailed map showing landmasses and coastlines with bronze candle holders

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit stone room, the camera explores a command room featuring a large wooden table with an ancient map of the Mediterranean. The camera moves closer to examine the map details with bronze candle holders, then pulls back and moves toward the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between stone fort buildings

events.description: exits the map room back to the outdoor fort courtyard
approaches and enters a second stone building doorway

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior of stone buildings toward another doorway

entered.detail: stone building with wooden door and small windows
tall wooden fence surrounding the fort
unpaved dirt trail between buildings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the map room into bright sunlight, the camera walks along a narrow dirt path between stone buildings of the fort. A wooden palisade fence is visible in the distance as the camera approaches and enters a second building.

events.description: enters the bedroom interior with rugs and bronze vessels

agents.ego_description: moving through a small bedroom with patterned rugs and bronze urns in the corner

entered.detail: large patterned rug with red and blue geometric designs covering the floor
tall bronze vessels and amphorae in the corner
raised stone platform with cushions for sleeping
exposed wooden beams supporting the roof

segments.scene_description: Inside a dimly lit bedroom, the camera explores the space featuring a large patterned rug, bronze urns in the corner, and a stone sleeping platform. The room has exposed wooden ceiling beams and small windows.

events.description: exits the bedroom back to the outdoor fort area
approaches and enters the storage building entrance

agents.ego_description: exiting the bedroom and walking past other soldiers toward a storage building

notable_agents.action: two soldiers in hoplite armor walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: stone building with open doorway leading to storage room
wooden structure with slanted roof adjacent to stone building

segments.scene_description: Exiting back into the sunny courtyard, the camera passes two soldiers in ancient Greek armor walking by. The camera continues toward a storage building with an adjacent wooden shed structure and enters the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with amphorae leading to wooden shed

events.description: enters the storage room with shelves of pottery
moves from stone storage room into the wooden palisade shed area

agents.ego_description: examining storage shelves with amphorae and moving through a wooden palisade shed with dirt floor

entered.detail: wooden shelving unit filled with clay amphorae and storage jars
rustic wooden work table with tools and materials
enclosed area with vertical wooden slats allowing light through gaps
stacked wooden crates and boxes

segments.scene_description: Inside the storage area, the camera explores shelves lined with clay amphorae and a wooden work table. The space transitions from the stone room to a wooden palisade shed with gaps in the walls allowing streaks of sunlight to enter.

scene_state.functional_zone: fort overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: exits the storage shed back to the open courtyard
ascends stone steps to reach the elevated overlook platform
panoramic view of the valley and distant settlement becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps to a high overlook with expansive views of the surrounding valley and distant town

entered.detail: elevated stone platform with paved surface and low walls
stone steps leading up to the overlook
expansive view of rolling hills and rocky terrain
ancient town with scattered buildings visible in the valley below
wooden gate structure at the overlook entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the storage area into bright sunlight, the camera crosses the courtyard and ascends stone steps to an elevated overlook. From the stone platform, there is a panoramic view of the surrounding valley with rolling hills and a distant ancient settlement visible in the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the interior and exterior spaces of an ancient fort, transitioning from enclosed stone rooms to a wide panoramic overlook. It begins in a sunlit courtyard before moving through a doorway into a dimly lit command room to examine a Mediterranean map on a wooden table. As the camera exits back into the bright sunlight, it navigates a narrow dirt path between buildings, passing through a bedroom with patterned rugs and bronze urns before crossing the courtyard past armored soldiers. The scene then shifts into a storage area filled with clay amphorae and a wooden shed where streaks of light pierce the walls, before finally emerging once more into the open air. The movement concludes as the camera ascends stone steps to an elevated platform, opening up to a vast view of rolling hills and a distant settlement in the valley below.
